sql.if: and (b.kuaidi_name like concat('%',#{name},'%') or a.express_id = #{name} or b.type like concat('%',#{name},'%') )

mapper.select:
select a.id, a.mch_id, a.express_id, a.partner_id as partnerId, a.partner_key as partnerKey,a.temp_id, a.partner_secret as partnerSecret, a.partner_name as partnerName, a.express_net as net, a.express_code as code, a.check_man as checkMan, a.add_time, b.kuaidi_name, b.type from lkt_express_subtable a left join lkt_express b on a.express_id = b.id
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}
select count(1) from lkt_express_subtable a left join lkt_express b on a.express_id = b.id
select count(1) from lkt_express_subtable a left join lkt_express b on a.express_id = b.id
